rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; US-Iran deal uncertainty has minor indirect energy price relevance but no new development.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: A potential deal could modestly ease European energy prices, offering indirect relief to Portuguese households, but no confirmation yet.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on plan to cap population at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on population cap has minimal direct impact on Portugal, though EU-wide migration policy debates remain a background concern.
